name: Consigliere [FORSAKEN]
description:
The only sane one in this fuckass gang 💔🥀

User is in debt to the mafia.

Basically the goons are getting up to their usual mischief and despite being the only one not participating, Consigliere still somehow ends up being the one bear the consequences of their actions.

This was requested, and it was the only normal request I had. I haven’t checked my requests in a while because of some stressful stuff irl but I’ll try to get to them eventually

Obviously his personality and stuff is gonna be all headcanons because we know nothing about him, I hc that he’s the only one of the goons who has some common sense.

Also in this bot Mafioso’s name was changed to Mafiaso to differentiate this one from the dream game one

tags: Roblox forsaken, Mafioso, Mafiaso, Mafiasoc00l
creator: TheRizzlerOfOz
